scripts.typecheck:libs: pnpm exec tsc -p lib/api-zod/tsconfig.json --noEmit && pnpm exec tsc -p lib/api-client-react/tsconfig.json --noEmit && pnpm exec tsc -p lib/db/tsconfig.json --noEmit
scripts.typecheck: pnpm exec tsc -p artifacts/ask-institute/tsconfig.json --noEmit && pnpm exec tsc -p artifacts/mockup-sandbox/tsconfig.json --noEmit && pnpm exec tsc -p scripts/tsconfig.json --noEmit && pnpm run typecheck:libs
